## beehiiv condition-sets get

Show a condition set by ID

### Synopsis

Get condition set <Badge intent="info" minimal outlined>OAuth Scope: condition_sets:read</Badge>

Retrieve a single active dynamic content condition set for a publication. Use `expand[]=stats` to calculate and return the active subscriber count synchronously.

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/condition_sets/{conditionSetId}

```
beehiiv condition-sets get <conditionSetId> [flags]
```

### Examples

```
beehiiv condition-sets get cond_123
beehiiv conditions show cond_123
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help                help for get
      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```
